basics.name: Ankan Ghosh
basics.summary: Senior ML Engineer at AIVAR (AWS Partner). Previously at OpenCV. Building with CNNs, VLMs, and Diffusion models. Authored 26+ articles at LearnOpenCV.

work.summary: Leading all Vision projects, managing teams of 20+ Engineers.
highlights: Delivered 3 projects: Medical image segmentation, Civil tile detection & extraction, Finance OCR & RAG pipeline using AWS (SageMaker, ECS, Batch, S3, DynamoDB, SQS, CloudWatch).
Architecting solutions for clients including Swiggy, Licious, Zepto, and LendenClub.

work.summary: Led R&D at OpenCV University; architected solutions from PoC to production.
highlights: Built solutions with CNNs, YOLO11, SAM2, ViT, OpenCV, DETR, SDXL, NeRF, 3DGS, VLMs, PEFT, RLHF, SFT, LoRA, MCP, ADK.
Worked on internal CRM OpenCV-SyncX; automated production deployment on AWS (EKS, EC2, Lambda, S3, RDS, DynamoDB).
Engineered LLM workflow with 82.5% accuracy for sales call analysis using HuggingFace, OpenAI, FastAPI, WhisperX.
Built OpenCV Demo Website; developed 20+ Computer Vision and LLM applications.

work.summary: Implemented Depth Estimation on OAK-D camera and deployed on Jetson Nano.
highlights: Contribution led to the startup being selected for the META XR Program.

publications.name: FineTuning SAM2 for Leaf Disease Segmentation
publications.summary: Step-by-step fine-tuning guide achieving 74% IoU. 200+ LinkedIn likes.

publications.name: YOLO11: Redefining Real-Time Object Detection
publications.summary: Cited by 2 academic papers; shared by Ultralytics official channels.

publications.name: FineTuning RetinaNet for Wildlife Detection with PyTorch
publications.summary: Featured at Dubai Expo. 79% accuracy on wildlife detection.

publications.name: YOLOv8 Object Tracking and Counting with OpenCV
publications.summary: Led to a job offer from Liquid Trees, San Francisco.

portfolio.name: PixelFusion
portfolio.description: Gradio demo for Artistic Neural Style Transfer. 16.5k Twitter views.

portfolio.name: SegMagine
portfolio.description: Gradio demo for Segment Anything Model (SAM) by Meta. 21k Twitter views.

portfolio.name: DocuMind
portfolio.description: End-to-End RAG application for document analysis. 2k Twitter views.
